component.name: jopt-simple
component.description: A Java library for parsing command line options

component.name: junit
component.description: JUnit is a unit testing framework for Java, created by Erich Gamma and Kent Beck.

component.name: hamcrest-core
component.description: This is the core API of hamcrest matcher framework to be used by third-party framework providers. This includes the a foundation set of matcher implementations for common operations.

component.name: log4j-api
component.description: The Apache Log4j API

component.name: log4j-core
component.description: The Apache Log4j Implementation

component.name: jackson-core
component.description: Core Jackson abstractions, basic JSON streaming API implementation

component.name: jackson-databind
component.description: General data-binding functionality for Jackson: works on core streaming API

component.name: jackson-module-afterburner
component.description: Jackson (https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson) extension module used to enhance performance using bytecode generation to replace use of Reflection for field access and method calls

component.name: jackson-dataformat-cbor
component.description: Support for reading and writing Concise Binary Object Representation ([CBOR](https://www.rfc-editor.org/info/rfc7049) encoded data using Jackson abstractions (streaming API, data binding, tree model)

component.name: jackson-annotations
component.description: Core annotations used for value types, used by Jackson data binding package.

component.name: joni
component.description: Java port of Oniguruma: http://www.geocities.jp/kosako3/oniguruma that uses byte arrays directly instead of java Strings and chars

component.name: jnr-netdb
component.description: Lookup TCP and UDP services from java

component.name: jnr-enxio
component.description: Native I/O access for java

component.name: jnr-x86asm
component.description: A pure-java X86 and X86_64 assembler

component.name: jnr-unixsocket
component.description: Native I/O access for java

component.name: jnr-posix
component.description: Common cross-project/cross-platform POSIX APIs

license.name: GNU Lesser General Public License Version 2.1

component.name: bytelist
component.description: Byte array based container

component.name: jnr-constants
component.description: A set of platform constants (e.g. errno values)

component.name: jcodings
component.description: Byte based encoding support library for java

component.name: jnr-ffi
component.description: A library for invoking native functions from java

component.name: jffi
component.description: Java Foreign Function Interface

component.name: jffi
component.description: Java Foreign Function Interface

component.name: snakeyaml
component.description: YAML 1.1 parser and emitter for Java

component.name: jzlib
component.description: JZlib is a re-implementation of zlib in pure Java

component.name: nailgun-server
component.description: Nailgun is a client, protocol, and server for running Java programs from the command line without incurring the JVM startup overhead. Programs run in the server (which is implemented in Java), and are triggered by the client (written in C), which handles all I/O. This project contains the SERVER ONLY.

component.name: joda-time
component.description: Date and time library to replace JDK date handling

component.name: log4j-api
component.description: The Apache Log4j API

component.name: log4j-core
component.description: The Apache Log4j Implementation

component.name: json-unit
component.description: Contains basic assertJsonEquals() and Hamcrest matchers.

component.name: securemock
component.description: Allows creating mocks in tests without having to grant dangerous permissions to all of your code.

component.name: json-unit-core
component.description: Core classes for JSON unit

component.name: slf4j-api
component.description: The slf4j API

component.name: jmh-core
component.description: The jmh is a Java harness for building, running, and analysing nano/micro/macro benchmarks written in Java and other languages targeting the JVM.

component.name: jmh-generator-annprocess
component.description: JMH benchmark generator, based on annotation processors.

component.name: guava
component.description: Guava is a suite of core and expanded libraries that include utility classes, google's collections, io classes, and much much more. Guava has only one code dependency - javax.annotation, per the JSR-305 spec.

component.name: commons-io
component.description: The Apache Commons IO library contains utility classes, stream implementations, file filters, file comparators, endian transformation classes, and much more.

component.name: commons-math3
component.description: The Math project is a library of lightweight, self-contained mathematics and statistics components addressing the most common practical problems not immediately available in the Java programming language or commons-lang.

component.name: jnr-constants
component.description: A set of platform constants (e.g. errno values)

component.name: jffi
component.description: Java Foreign Function Interface

component.name: jffi
component.description: Java Foreign Function Interface
